hero.headline: A table worth staying for.
hero.subtext: Seasonal plates, an unhurried room, and a cellar that earns its keep.

items.title: Small plates
items.desc: Bright, share-friendly starters that set the table talking.

items.title: From the grill
items.desc: Dry-aged cuts and day-boat fish, cooked over live fire.

items.title: Chef's tasting
items.desc: A guided seven-course journey through the season.

items.title: Cellar & pairings
items.desc: A living list, poured by the glass or matched course by course.

items.title: Private dining
items.desc: A room of your own for celebrations and long lunches.

items.title: Desserts
items.desc: Pastry that remembers you were saving room.

about.body: We cook with what the season gives us and serve it in a room built for lingering. Ingredients are sourced close to home, the fire stays lit, and every plate leaves the pass only when it is right. Come hungry, stay late.

points: Seasonal menu, changed as the market changes
Thoughtful wine list with by-the-glass pairings
Warm, unhurried service in a room made for evenings

items.name: R. Sharma
items.quote: An effortless evening — every course better than the last, and never rushed.

items.name: A. Fernandes
items.quote: The pairings made the meal. Booked our anniversary here before we'd left.

items.name: Chef's tasting
features: Seven courses, guided by the kitchen.

items.name: Private dining
features: Your own room for groups and events.
Bespoke menu planned with our team

items.a: Yes — book online or call ahead, especially for weekends and larger tables.
Absolutely. Tell us when you book and the kitchen will plan around it.
Open for lunch and dinner — see the contact section for today's hours.
